text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pawel
Date: Fri Dec 19 17:37:39 UTC 2014
New revision: 374958
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/374958

Log:
  ChefAPI is a tiny, dependency-minimal Ruby client for interacting with a
  Chef Server. It adopts many patterns and principles from Ruby On Rails.

  WWW: https://github.com/sethvargo/chef-api

  PR:		195707
  Submitted by:	Michael Moll <kvedulv@kvedulv.de>

Changes:

  head/sysutils/rubygem-chef-api/
  head/sysutils/rubygem-chef-api/Makefile
  head/sysutils/rubygem-chef-api/distinfo
  head/sysutils/rubygem-chef-api/pkg-descr
